title: Growth VR
description: Growth is a VR modpack focused on immersion, adventure and survival.
body:
# Growth VR

Growth is a VR modpack made from the ground up to be played in VR, it focuses on immersion, adventure and being lightweight.
The world is carefully crafted to feel like its actually alive, villagers smooth out their paths, flowers regrow and everything is made to feel like an actual real world.

## How is it "made for VR"?

Growth includes [ImmersiveMC](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersivemc) which makes it possible to craft, smelt and do much more by physically placing the items in the block of choice.
There are also as little menus as possible, since a lot of menus and crafting can be very immersion breaking.


## What if I don't have VR or don't want to use VR?

There is a non-VR version here!  
https://modrinth.com/modpack/growth-non-vr
